name: skill-validator
description: Validate Codex skills, plugins, and plugin repositories before use, sharing, or publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Validate Codex skills, plugins, and marketplaces.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles the skill-validator skill and a uv-friendly validator script for checking SKILL.md structure, skill metadata, optional OpenAI agent metadata, plugin manifests, marketplace manifests, local references, script syntax, and unresolved placeholders before using or publishing a skill repository.
defaultPrompt: Use Skill Validator to validate this Codex skill directory.
Use Skill Validator to check whether this skill is ready to publish.
